title: Sully's Mod
description: The goal of this mod is to add interesting features while still keeping a vanilla vibe
body:
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d296ff9e6e2228f3c9285a287648fb73ed25de4_0.webp) [![Requires Blueprint](https://tinyurl.com/mtuys7pu)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Uraneptus/Sullys-Mod?style=for-the-badge&color=78a24b&labelColor=3b753b)](https://github.com/Uraneptus/Sullys-Mod/blob/main/LICENSE) [![](https://img.shields.io/discord/716283768825970771?label=&color=78a24b&labelColor=3b753b&logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/nuVuQ4v) ![https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png](https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png) ## 📘About: Sully’s Mod started out a few years ago when I decided to try and make a mod. I couldn’t think of a name and called it the first name that came to my head as a placeholder “Sully”, the name stuck and now people think my name is actually Sully.
Back then it was made with MCreator and combined with the fact that I back then didn’t have a good understanding of vanilla feel, it became more limited each version. I decided to completely revamp the mod, completely dumping the MCreator version and getting a coding team (Uraneptus and MiteBeMana).
With each feature I try to think it out as well as I can, making sure the feature is well-balanced, feels fun to play with and overall just feels like something new. It tries it’s best to feel like a Minecraft update full of random features. The mod is planned to have features for every player, explorers, builders and redstone engineers. ![https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png](https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png) ## 📝Current Features: **[Disclaimer the mod is currently in it's beta so many features are not yet implemented, check out this doc if you want to know more about the planned features: [Planned](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1O0-PYvZDjAtcMZySJMDEGL2xQSIM8Znr9rzibRzqDeA/edit?usp=drivesdk)]** **• Jade** **• Jade Flinger Totem** **• Jade Shield** **• Jade Horse Armor** **• Copper Buttons** **• Laternfish** **• Tortoise** **• Tortoise Shell** **• Bouldering Zombie** **• Jungle Spider** **• Petrified Tree & Amber** **• Artifacts** **• Piranha & Throwing Knife** **• Selection System** _If you want to know more about the indiviudal features, check our wiki out: [Sully's Mod Wiki](https://github.com/Uraneptus/Sullys-Mod/wiki)_ ![https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png](https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png) ## 💼 Dev team: **Sully:** _Art, Animations, Game Design, Sound Design_ \[[Twitter](https://twitter.com/ModSully)] **Uraneptus:** _Code, Additional Sound Design, Mod Icon/Banner, Documentation_ [[Twitter](https://twitter.com/uraneptus2)] **MiteBeMana:** _Code, Additional Game Design_ [[Twitter](https://twitter.com/MiteBeMana)] **KekeCreations:** Code [[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CreationsKeke)] **A full list of all Contributors can be found here:** [Credits Page](https://github.com/Uraneptus/Sullys-Mod/wiki/Credits) ![https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png](https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png) ## 📋FAQ: **"What is planned for the remake?"** - Here is a doc with all of the planned concepts that are done: [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1O0-PYvZDjAtcMZySJMDEGL2xQSIM8Znr9rzibRzqDeA/edit?usp=drivesdk)
There is more to come though! **"Why are you remaking the mod?"** - Check this twitter thread out: [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ModSully/status/1483351756033732611) **"For which minecraft version will the mod be remade?"** - 1.20.1+ A backport is currently not planned! **"When will you update to [insert mc version] ?"** - We will eventually, but we can't give you an ETA! **"How does this feature work? / Why doesn't [...] work?"** - Please read the wiki before asking questions like this, if you haven't found your answer there, feel free to ask in our discord server! **![https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png](https://i.imgur.com/fN4UrzH.png)
